# Analysi CLI

The Analysi CLI (`analysi`) is a command-line tool for interacting with the Analysi Security Platform API. It is built on oclif and supports table, JSON, and CSV output formats.

## Installation and Authentication

```bash
# Install dependencies
make cli-install

# Build the CLI
make cli-build

# Log in (interactive prompt for server URL, tenant, credentials)
analysi auth login
```

Credentials are stored at `~/.config/analysi/credentials.json` with `0600` permissions. The default tenant is set during login and can be overridden per-command with `--tenant` or the `ANALYSI_TENANT_ID` environment variable.

## Commands

### auth

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi auth login` | Interactive login (server URL, tenant, credentials) |
| `analysi auth logout` | Log out and remove stored credentials |

### status

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi status` | Dashboard showing alert counts by severity, recent run statuses, and integration health |

### config

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi config show` | Show current configuration |

### alerts
_Manage security alerts_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi alerts list` | List alerts with optional filters |
| `analysi alerts get <alert_id>` | Get alert details |
| `analysi alerts search` | Search alerts by query |
| `analysi alerts analyze <alert_id>` | Start analysis on an alert with live progress |
| `analysi alerts watch <analysis_id>` | Attach to a running analysis with live progress |
| `analysi alerts validate @alert.json` | Validate alert JSON against alert schema |

**`analysi alerts list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--status` | Filter by analysis status |
| `--severity` | Filter by severity |
| `--source_vendor` | Filter by source vendor (e.g. Splunk) |
| `--source_product` | Filter by source product |
| `--disposition_category` | Filter by disposition category |
| `--sort_by` | Sort field (options: human_readable_id, title, severity, analysis_status, triggering_event_time, created_at, updated_at) |
| `--sort_order` | Sort order (asc, desc) (options: asc, desc) |
| `--include_short_summary` | Include short summary in results (boolean) |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |
| `--offset` | Offset for pagination (integer; default: 0) |

**`analysi alerts search` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--q` | Search query |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |

### tasks
_Manage tasks_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi tasks list` | List tasks |
| `analysi tasks get <task_id>` | Get task details |
| `analysi tasks run <task_id>` | Execute a task |
| `analysi tasks create --script @script.cy` | Create a task from a Cy script |
| `analysi tasks update <task_id> --script @new.cy` | Update task script, directive, or description |
| `analysi tasks compile --script @script.cy` | Type-check a Cy script without executing |
| `analysi tasks run-adhoc --script @script.cy` | Run an ad-hoc Cy script with live progress |

**`analysi tasks list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--function` | Filter by task function |
| `--scope` | Filter by task scope |
| `--q` | Search query (name, description, tags) |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |

**`analysi tasks run` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--data` | JSON input data (or @filepath to read from file) |

### workflows
_Manage workflows_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi workflows list` | List workflows |
| `analysi workflows get <workflow_id>` | Get workflow details |
| `analysi workflows update <workflow_id>` | Update workflow metadata |
| `analysi workflows delete <workflow_id>` | Delete a workflow |
| `analysi workflows node-templates` | List available workflow node templates (identity, merge, collect) |
| `analysi workflows run <workflow_id>` | Execute a workflow |
| `analysi workflows compose --data @composition.json` | Create workflow from array composition format |

**`analysi workflows list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--name` | Filter by workflow name |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |
| `--offset` | Offset for pagination (integer; default: 0) |

**`analysi workflows update` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--data` | JSON update data (or @filepath). Fields: name, description, io_schema, data_samples |

**`analysi workflows node-templates` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--name` | Filter by template name |
| `--enabled_only` | Only return enabled templates (boolean) |

**`analysi workflows run` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--data` | JSON input data (or @filepath to read from file) |

### integrations
_Manage integrations_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi integrations list` | List configured integrations |
| `analysi integrations get <integration_id>` | Get integration details |
| `analysi integrations health <integration_id>` | Check integration health |
| `analysi integrations tools <integration_type>` | List tools available for an integration type |
| `analysi integrations runs <integration_id>` | List recent runs for an integration |
| `analysi integrations run-tool <id> <tool> --data '{...}'` | Execute an integration tool with JSON args |

**`analysi integrations list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--enabled` | Filter by enabled status (boolean) |

### task-runs
_View task execution runs_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi task-runs list` | List task runs |
| `analysi task-runs get <task_run_id>` | Get task run details |

**`analysi task-runs list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--task_id` | Filter by task ID |
| `--workflow_run_id` | Filter by workflow run ID |
| `--status` | Filter by run status (options: running, completed, failed) |
| `--sort` | Sort field (options: created_at, updated_at, status, duration) |
| `--order` | Sort order (asc, desc) (options: asc, desc) |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |

### workflow-runs
_View workflow execution runs_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi workflow-runs list` | List workflow runs |
| `analysi workflow-runs get <workflow_run_id>` | Get workflow run details |
| `analysi workflow-runs status <workflow_run_id>` | Get workflow run status |
| `analysi workflow-runs watch <run_id>` | Attach to a running workflow with live progress |

**`analysi workflow-runs list` flags:**

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--workflow_id` | Filter by workflow ID |
| `--status` | Filter by run status (options: running, completed, failed, cancelled) |
| `--sort` | Sort field (options: created_at, started_at, completed_at, status) |
| `--order` | Sort order (asc, desc) (options: asc, desc) |
| `--limit` | Maximum number of results (integer; default: 25) |

### tools
_Discover Cy language tools_

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi tools list` | List all active Cy tool FQNs (native + integration tools) |
| `analysi tools get <fqn>` | Get tool details by fully qualified name |

### packs

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi packs install <pack> [--dry-run]` | Install a content pack into a tenant |
| `analysi packs list` | List installed content packs with component counts |
| `analysi packs uninstall <pack>` | Uninstall a content pack (removes all its components) |

### platform

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `analysi platform tenants create <id> [--owner-email <email>]` | Create a new tenant with optional owner |
| `analysi platform tenants list` | List all tenants (platform admin only) |
| `analysi platform tenants describe <id>` | Show tenant details including component counts |
| `analysi platform tenants delete <id> --confirm <id>` | Delete a tenant and cascade all data |
| `analysi platform provision <tenant> --packs foundation,examples` | Provision a tenant with content packs |

## Output Formats

All commands support three output formats via `--output` (or `-o`):

- **table** (default) -- Formatted with smart column selection, relative timestamps, and colorized status/severity.
- **json** -- Raw JSON with exact timestamps for scripting.
- **csv** -- CSV with headers for spreadsheet import.

Additional flags:
- `--fields col1,col2` -- Override column selection
- `--no-header` -- Suppress table/CSV headers (scripting)
- `--out <file>` -- Write output to a file
- `--verbose` / `-v` -- Show request URL, query params, timing

## Common Workflows

```bash
# Export high-severity alerts as CSV
analysi alerts list --severity high --output csv --out high_alerts.csv

# Pipe alert IDs to another tool
analysi alerts list --output csv --fields alert_id --no-header | xargs ...

# Run a task with file input and save JSON output
analysi tasks run <task_id> --data @input.json --output json --out result.json

# Check all integration health
analysi integrations list --output json | jq '.[].id' | xargs -I{} analysi integrations health {}
```

## Common User Questions

- "How do I install the CLI?" -- Run `make cli-install && make cli-build`. Then `analysi auth login` to authenticate.
- "How do I switch tenants?" -- Use `--tenant <id>` on any command, or set `ANALYSI_TENANT_ID`.
- "How do I provide input data?" -- Use `--data '{"key":"val"}'` for inline JSON or `--data @filepath.json` to read from a file.
- "Why does the table only show some columns?" -- Auto-selects up to 8 columns. Use `--fields col1,col2,...` to override.
- "How do I get machine-readable output?" -- Use `--output json` or `--output csv`.
